title: Social Media Marketing with AI
shortDescription: Master AI-powered social media marketing strategies, tools, and automation to grow your brand and drive results across all platforms.
longDescription: Transform your social media marketing with the power of AI. This comprehensive course teaches you how to leverage ChatGPT, AI design tools, analytics platforms, and automation to create engaging content, build loyal communities, and drive measurable results. Perfect for marketers, entrepreneurs, content creators, and agencies looking to scale their social media impact without burning out. Learn proven strategies used by top brands and influencers to dominate social media using cutting-edge AI tools.

modules.title: AI for Social Media Strategy
modules.description: Master AI tools for audience research, content planning, and platform-specific strategies. Learn to create 90-day growth plans and content calendars that drive engagement.
topics: AI tools landscape (ChatGPT, Jasper, Copy.ai, Canva AI)
learningObjectives: Identify and use the right AI tools for social media marketing

modules.title: AI-Powered Content Creation
modules.description: Learn to create compelling captions, hashtag strategies, and repurpose content across platforms using AI. Master viral content frameworks and platform-specific optimization.
topics: Caption writing formulas (Hook + Value + CTA + Hashtags)

modules.title: Visual Content & AI Design Tools
modules.description: Master AI image generation, Canva AI features, and video creation. Learn to create stunning visuals that match platform requirements and drive engagement.
topics: AI image generation (DALL-E, Midjourney, Stable Diffusion)
Canva AI features (Magic Write, Magic Design, Magic Edit)
learningObjectives: Generate professional images using AI tools
Master Canva AI for rapid design

modules.title: AI for Social Media Analytics
modules.description: Use AI to analyze performance data, track metrics, run A/B tests, and calculate ROI. Learn predictive analytics and competitor analysis strategies.
learningObjectives: Analyze social media data using AI
Track and optimize key performance metrics

modules.title: AI-Powered Community Management
modules.description: Automate comment responses, integrate customer service AI, monitor sentiment, and manage crises. Build engaged communities that scale.
learningObjectives: Integrate AI into customer service workflows
Handle crises effectively with AI assistance

modules.title: Advanced AI Marketing Tactics
modules.description: Master influencer outreach, ad optimization, multi-platform campaigns, CRM integration, and advanced analytics. Prepare for the future of AI marketing.
learningObjectives: Optimize ad campaigns using AI testing
Integrate social media with email and CRM
Prepare for emerging AI marketing technologies

deliverables: 50+ hashtag sets for different goals and platforms
Video script templates for Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts
prerequisites: Active social media account to practice with
targetAudience: Anyone looking to scale their social media impact with AI

seo.metaTitle: Social Media Marketing with AI Course - Master AI-Powered Social Media | AI Learn Hub
seo.metaDescription: Learn to dominate social media using AI tools like ChatGPT, Canva AI, and automation platforms. Create content 10x faster, analyze performance, and grow your audience. Perfect for marketers and entrepreneurs. Enroll now for $29!

testimonials.name: Coming Soon
testimonials.text: Course launching soon. Be one of the first students!

faqs.question: Do I need any AI experience to take this course?
faqs.answer: No! This course is designed for beginners. We start with AI basics and guide you through every tool and technique step-by-step.

faqs.question: What platforms does this course cover?
faqs.answer: We cover all major platforms: Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, LinkedIn, Twitter/X, Pinterest, and YouTube. You'll learn platform-specific strategies for each.

faqs.question: Do I need paid AI tools to complete this course?
faqs.answer: No! While we show premium tools, all core lessons can be completed with free tools like ChatGPT, Canva Free, and built-in platform analytics.

faqs.question: How long does it take to complete?
faqs.answer: The course is 2.7 hours of video content, but we recommend spending 1-2 weeks to practice and implement what you learn as you go.

faqs.question: Will I get a certificate?
faqs.answer: Yes! After completing all modules and passing the quizzes (70% score), you'll receive a verified completion certificate you can share on LinkedIn.

faqs.question: Is this course updated for 2024-2025?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! This course was created in late 2024 and includes the latest AI tools, platform algorithm changes, and current best practices.

faqs.question: Can I use this for my business or clients?
faqs.answer: Yes! Everything you learn can be applied to your own business, personal brand, or client work. All templates and frameworks are yours to use commercially.

faqs.question: What if I'm not satisfied?
faqs.answer: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee. If you're not happy with the course for any reason, just contact us for a full refund.

whatYouWillLearn: Create engaging social media content 10x faster using AI
Develop data-driven social media strategies that drive results
Generate professional visuals and videos with AI design tools
Analyze performance data and optimize campaigns for better ROI
Automate community management while maintaining authenticity
Build and execute multi-platform campaigns efficiently
Leverage influencer marketing and partnership programs
Master advanced analytics and attribution models
Future-proof your marketing skills with emerging AI technologies
